name: licensecc
description: Local orchestration scripts for the Licensecc monorepo.

scripts.lint:services: npm --prefix services/cloudflare-licensing-backend run lint && npm --prefix services/cloudflare-license-admin run lint && npm --prefix services/cloudflare-customer-portal run lint && npm --prefix services/cloudflare-d1-backup run lint
scripts.test:backend: npm --prefix services/cloudflare-licensing-backend run test && npm --prefix services/cloudflare-licensing-backend run test:sql && npm --prefix services/cloudflare-licensing-backend run test:pg
scripts.test:admin: npm --prefix services/cloudflare-license-admin run test && npm --prefix services/cloudflare-license-admin run test:sql && npm --prefix services/cloudflare-license-admin run test:ui
scripts.test:portal: npm --prefix services/cloudflare-customer-portal run test && npm --prefix services/cloudflare-customer-portal run test:ui
